title: Polymer Patch For Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams
description: A Polymer Patch mod for Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams, allowing it to work fully server side!
body:
# Polymer Patch for Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams
This is a patch for [Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams](https://modrinth.com/mod/gensokyo-reverie-of-lost-dreams), making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams is required and not included within this mod.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about [Gensokyo: Reverie of Lost Dreams on it's Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/gensokyo-reverie-of-lost-dreams)!
